title: API layer: fetchCreateOptions, createPane, createAgent
action: Add three typed fetch wrappers to web/src/api.ts mirroring the existing fetchAgents/sendReply pattern (same request() helper). fetchCreateOptions() calls GET /api/create-options and returns {destinations, presets} with a Destination type {workspace_id, label, path: string|null, path_is_live: boolean} and PresetOption {label} -- field names exactly match docs/specs/web-api.md's Data Dictionary. createPane(workspaceId) calls POST /api/panes; createAgent(workspaceId, preset) calls POST /api/agents. Per web-api.md's error table (409 stale destination, 400 unknown preset, 502 other), these two must return a discriminated success/error result the caller can render without wrapping business-logic errors in try/catch -- preserve the backend's {error: string} message on every non-2xx response, never discard it. The SUCCESS branch of createPane's result must carry the response body's pane_id and tab_id; the SUCCESS branch of createAgent's result must additionally carry name -- these are load-bearing for a later cell (web-create-sheet-3) that builds a post-create navigation reference from exactly these fields, so do not narrow the success type to a bare boolean/ok flag. Do not reuse the existing fetchAgents 404-means-logged-out convention for the two POST calls (they are only reachable already-authenticated); do reuse it for fetchCreateOptions since it mirrors fetchAgents exactly.

truths: fetchCreateOptions() parses destinations[] and presets[] with exactly the field names web-api.md documents
createPane() and createAgent() return a discriminated success/error result, never throwing on a 400/409/502 business-logic response
A 502/409/400 response's error message is preserved in the returned result, never discarded

createPane's success result exposes pane_id and tab_id; createAgent's success result exposes pane_id, tab_id, and name -- matching the backend's {tab_id, pane_id[, name]} response body field-for-field

artifacts.substantive: exports fetchCreateOptions, createPane, createAgent and their Destination/PresetOption/CreateOptions types, no stubs

key_links: web/src/api.ts's new functions use the existing request() helper
prohibitions: Do not modify fetchAgents, fetchHealth, sendReply, sendKeys, fetchScreen, login, or logout
Do not add any DOM/UI code -- pure data layer only

verify: cd web && npm run typecheck && npm run test -- --run test/api.test.ts

trace.outcome: Added fetchCreateOptions, createPane, createAgent to web/src/api.ts with Destination/PresetOption/CreateOptions types and discriminated CreatePaneResult/CreateAgentResult success/error results; error messages preserved on 400/409/502; success carries pane_id/tab_id (+name for agent). 17 new tests in web/test/api.test.ts, all passing.
trace.verify_output: tsc --noEmit: clean. vitest: Test Files 1 passed (1), Tests 21 passed (21)
trace.verify_command: cd web && npm run typecheck && npm run test -- --run test/api.test.ts
